name: UCI Wine Quality Regression
prompt: Download the red wine quality CSV from https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/machine-learning-databases/wine-quality/winequality-red.csv (semicolon separator). Clean it, engineer features, run EDA and train a baseline Random Forest regressor to predict wine quality, then have the scientist try to beat it. Review and report.

name: Synthetic Churn Classification
prompt: Generate a synthetic customer churn dataset, clean it, engineer useful features, train a classifier, have the scientist improve the model, review the methodology, and write a report.

name: Dirty Data Cleaning Stress Test
prompt: Generate a small dirty tabular dataset with missing values, duplicate rows, bad numeric types, categorical noise, and a binary target. Clean it, engineer features, train a simple baseline model, review the methodology, and report.
